overall.description: Cinematic game ending sequence viewed from behind a car driving through a dark forest at night. Two characters are visible through the rear window as end credits roll over the scene with a moody blue-green atmospheric palette.

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a steady position behind a moving car driving through a dark forest at night. Through the rear window, two characters are visible in the front seats facing forward as trees pass by in the background. End credits for environment and character artists scroll over the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: car interior viewed through rear window during night drive

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive as passenger turns to look at driver

passenger turns head left to look toward driver

segments.scene_description: The drive continues through the dark forest as the end credits display gameplay and UI staff names. The passenger character turns her head to look toward the driver, creating a subtle interaction between the two figures visible through the rear window.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady camera position behind a moving car as it travels through a dark, atmospheric forest under a moody blue-green palette. It begins with the vehicle gliding through the dense woods, where the silhouettes of two characters are visible through the rear window while environment and character artist credits scroll across the screen. As the drive continues deeper into the nocturnal landscape, the credits shift to display the names of gameplay and UI staff. The scene then evolves from a static observation into a subtle character moment as the passenger turns her head to look toward the driver. Finally, the camera maintains its trailing perspective as the car disappears further into the shadows of the passing trees.
